name: No-Cook Apple Raspberry Jam
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Finely ground peeled and cored apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly crush the berries using a potato masher.
2. If desired, sieve half of the pulp to remove some seeds; measure 1-1/2 cups of prepared berries.
3. Pour the measured berries into a large bowl. Add apples.
4. Add sugar to the bowl; mix well.
5. Let stand for 10 minutes.
6. Add lemon juice and liquid fruit pectin to the bowl; stir for 3 minutes (a few sugar crystals will remain).
7. Ladle jam into clean containers, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
8. Cover with tight-fitting lids.
9. Allow the jam to stand at room temperature until set (may take up to 24 hours).
10. Store in the freezer if used within 3 weeks. Makes 4-1/2 cups.
